comment: "The course was informative and it covers most aspects of ED thoracotomy and challenges faced. Overall the course was great and effort was made to make this happen. Many thanks to the team."
"I found the real world experience and examples of the course providers to be particularly valuable."
"Congratulations on making this kind of free courses! This is the right way to go!"
"I found the 'who' section gives a nice pverview of the evidence to be particularly valuable."
"I found the importance of clinical reasoning they show to be particularly valuable."
